subject: tieng-anh
topic: Đề thi thử cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh lớp 5 (bấm giờ)

questions.question: What does 'doctor' mean? (Từ 'doctor' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English for 'thức dậy'? ('thức dậy' tiếng Anh là gì?)
What does 'library' mean? (Từ 'library' nghĩa là gì?)
Complete: 'I get up ___ 6 o'clock.' (lúc — điền giới từ chỉ giờ)
Write 'giáo viên' in English (Viết 'giáo viên' bằng tiếng Anh): ___
Match the daily activity with its meaning (Nối hoạt động hằng ngày với nghĩa)
Complete: 'She ___ to school every day.' (đi — ngôi thứ ba số ít)
Complete (future): 'I ___ visit my grandma next week.' (sẽ)
Complete: 'What's the matter?' - 'I have a ___.' (đau đầu — điền 'headache')
Where do you buy food? (Em mua thức ăn ở đâu?)
Choose the correct question about time (Chọn câu hỏi đúng về giờ giấc)
options: What time do you get up?

questions.question: Match the job with its meaning (Nối nghề nghiệp với nghĩa)

questions.passage: Hoa gets up at 6 o'clock every morning. She has breakfast and goes to school at 7. In the future, she wants to be a teacher because she loves children.
questions.question: What time does Hoa get up? (Hoa thức dậy lúc mấy giờ?)

questions.passage: Hoa gets up at 6 o'clock every morning. She has breakfast and goes to school at 7. In the future, she wants to be a teacher because she loves children.
questions.question: What does Hoa want to be in the future? (Trong tương lai Hoa muốn làm nghề gì?)

questions.passage: Hoa gets up at 6 o'clock every morning. She has breakfast and goes to school at 7. In the future, she wants to be a teacher because she loves children.
questions.question: Why does Hoa want that job? (Vì sao Hoa muốn làm nghề đó?)
Ask a friend what she wants to be in the future (Hỏi bạn muốn làm nghề gì trong tương lai)
options: What do you want to be in the future?
